title: Infinite loop when asynchronously loading corrupted stats
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

1. Start the TiDB cluster: `tiup playground nightly --tag test-async-load`
2. Create a table and inster some data:
```sql
use test;

CREATE TABLE public_xxx (
    id INT NOT NULL,
    val INT,
    PRIMARY KEY (id),
    INDEX idx_xxx_val (val)
);

INSERT INTO public_xxx (id, val)
SELECT a.N + b.N * 10 + 1 AS id,
       FLOOR(RAND() * 1000) AS val
FROM (SELECT 0 AS N UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4
      UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) a
JOIN (SELECT 0 AS N UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4
      UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) b
LIMIT 3000;
```
3. Analyze the table and mess up the bucket data:
```sql
analyze table public_xxx all columns;

update mysql.stats_buckets set upper_bound = 'who knows what it is' where table_id = 112;
```
4. Run the query: `EXPLAIN SELECT id FROM public_xxx where val = 111;`

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
Do not keep loading this corrupted stats.

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
It went into an infinite loop.

```log
[2025/04/16 15:00:06.675 +08:00] [ERROR] [read.go:613] ["load needed histogram failed"] [category=stats] [sampled=] [error="[types:1292]Truncated incorrect DOUBLE value: 'who knows what it is'"] [tableID=112] [histID=1] [isIndex=false] [IsSyncLoadFailed=true] [fullLoad=true]
[2025/04/16 15:00:06.676 +08:00] [WARN] [domain.go:2732] ["Load histograms failed"] [category=stats] [sampled=] [error="[types:1292]Truncated incorrect DOUBLE value: 'who knows what it is'"] [errorVerbose="[types:1292]Truncated incorrect DOUBLE value: 'who knows what it ### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)
```

master
poc: FROM (SELECT 0 AS N UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4
UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) a
JOIN (SELECT 0 AS N UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4
UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) b
key_bug_features: Asynchronously loading corrupted statistics causes infinite loop
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT NOT NULL, val VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (id));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, val) VALUES (1, 'test value'), (2, NULL), (3, 'another value');
UPDATE test_table SET val = 'updated value' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, val FROM test_table WHERE val IS NULL;

INSERT INTO test_table (id, val) SELECT a.N + b.N * 10 + 1, CONCAT('value ', a.N + b.N * 10 + 1) FROM (SELECT 0 AS N UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4) a JOIN (SELECT 0 AS N UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4) b LIMIT 5;
